required_preferences.fact: Now avoids all evening audiobook listening in favor of non-screen, non-audio activities (like aromatherapy, gentle stretching, or journaling by hand) to minimize any extended media exposure due to prescribed screen/audio limits for tension headaches.

supersedes.fact: Listens to audiobook versions of mystery novels in the evenings instead of physically reading print or ebooks — avoids holding a book or device for prolonged periods

required_preferences.fact: Administers complex medication regimen and mobility assistance throughout the day for her cat, adjusting her schedule to accommodate multiple treatments at varying times.

supersedes.fact: Prepares the cat’s medication every morning before breakfast — never alters the timing

required_preferences.fact: Schedules medication reminders for muscle relaxants through her phone to ensure no missed doses during her treatment period
Drafts travel itineraries at least three days in advance — never arranges travel last-minute
Logs daily standing and sitting intervals in an app as part of physical therapy tracking — avoids manual journaling or paper logs
Organizes shared shopping trips and nursery planning sessions with her sister, preferring joint tasks over solo leisure-oriented outings until the baby arrives.

persona: A 28-year-old office administrator supporting a remote sales team
